insight: PlayerCache.java has two duplicated deserialization paths parsing the same keys: the SimpleResultSet constructor (reads the JSON "Data" column) and loadDataFromDataSectionOfMap (proxy sync). Any new persisted field must be loaded in both and saved via data.putIfExists(), or it silently breaks either DB load or proxy sync.

There is no command-mute-cannot-command lang key: when a muted player runs a blocked command, ChatControl reuses the same command-mute-cannot-chat-* keys (player/channel/server/proxy variants) because the command listener routes through the same mute check as chat. To customize the "muted, can't run commands" message, edit those cannot-chat keys.
